other_observers: Joey Kellner, Kathy Mihm Dunning, Joe Roller, Dean Shoup, Nena Shoup, Charles Lawrence, Cheryl Teuton, Dan Brooke
specific_location: Willow Circle neighborhood of Colorado Springs
description: This Acorn Woodpecker has been observed many times at this location since being found by Marty Wolf in December 2012.  Distinctive characteristics are black back, white patch at base of primaries, white rump, black streaks on undersides, red cap, and clownish face.  It is identified as female by the partial red cap.
